creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, Sebastien. The ice-ports all were just updated to 3.5.0 and, 
according to maintainer of devel/ice, php binding works just fine both 
with php 5.3 and 5.4. Maintainership was also passed to Michael, since 
it make sense for convinience reasons to have one maintainer for all 
ice-related ports. Hope, you will agree. Thank you for the submission!
